meta.name: Sportsing
meta.description:
Sportsing! is your all-access pass to sports, blending expert insights, real-life experiences, and humor. We cover everything from game highlights to the personal stories shaping athletes and the industry. Whether you're an aspiring athlete, a supportive parent, or just want to sound confident talking sports, we've got you. From trends and athlete interviews to training tips and behind-the-scenes moments, Sportsing! is the ultimate sports conversation starter.

Hosted by Gloria Govan (Basketball Wives, EDGE Hydration) and Erica Lynn O’Keith (Romeo!, Tabula Rasa), this podcast bridges sports, entertainment, and business. With their media and entrepreneurial experience, they bring fresh, compelling sports perspectives you won’t find anywhere else.
